hook_type: News-pattern setup before verbatim quote (Caples #20 'Announcing' + named-fund specificity)
tactic: Specific news hook -> verbatim peer quote -> fund stack -> recursion
primary_text:
Triple Bubble's first investment from their new fintech fund: Birchal.

"I've looked at Birchal from the founder's seat and the investor's seat, and from both angles the answer is the same. Birchal is one of the most important companies in Australian fintech."

Dom Pym, Triple Bubble.

Australia Venture Partners Fund and Tribe Global have followed.

Now we are opening our own raise.

Save your spot. Read the offer when it opens.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Why Triple Bubble bet first on Birchal
description: The first investment from their new fintech fund.
_source_label: DRC V3 -- B2 Investor-validation / Peer-decision (existing investors)
_v3_changes: Hook setup: added news-pattern lead-in 'Triple Bubble's first investment from their new fintech fund: Birchal.' BEFORE the Pym verbatim. Reader gets specific (Triple Bubble, new fund) + curiosity (why Birchal first?) before the quote lands. Halbert 4->5.
Headline retouched: 'Founder seat, investor seat, same answer' -> 'Why Triple Bubble bet first on Birchal' (Caples #3 'Why' pattern, named fund + curiosity).
H-INV-01 'Founder seat, investor seat, same answer' kept in headlines tab as alternate.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors who understand CSF mechanics; peer signal weighs more than platform stats.
